CustomField.description: JSON map of the user's notification preferences keyed by channel and event type. Replaces the per-record NotificationPreference__c custom object — same data, same per-user privacy via the Hierarchy custom setting's SetupOwnerId. Shape: { "Email": { "Stage_Change": { "enabled": true, "digestFrequency": "Immediate" }, ... }, "Slack": { ... } }. Maintained by DeliveryNotificationPreferenceService.
CustomField.inlineHelpText: Per-user JSON map of notification preferences.
CustomField.label: Notification Preferences JSON
